welcome.title: Welcome to Bibliogon
welcome.heading: Before you start
welcome.docker_required: Bibliogon runs inside Docker, an isolated container system.
welcome.docker_size: Docker Desktop is a free program from Docker Inc., about 800 MB to download and install.
welcome.first_run_size: On first launch, Bibliogon downloads and builds its containers (about 2 GB of disk space, 5-10 minutes).
welcome.trust_anchor: Docker is established (since 2013), free, and used by millions of developers worldwide.
welcome.guide_link: Read the Bibliogon Docker installation guide
docker.missing.title: Docker Desktop not found
docker.missing.heading: Bibliogon needs Docker Desktop
docker.missing.explanation: Bibliogon runs in an isolated container. The container system is called Docker and is not yet installed on this computer.
docker.missing.next_step: After installing Docker Desktop, start it and wait until the whale icon turns blue, then launch Bibliogon again.
docker.daemon.title: Docker Desktop is not running
docker.daemon.message:
Docker Desktop needs to be running before Bibliogon can start.

Open Docker Desktop, wait for it to finish starting, then click Retry.
docker.daemon.exhausted_message:
Docker Desktop is still not running after several attempts.

Please start Docker Desktop and open Bibliogon again.
install_prompt.title: Bibliogon is not installed
install_prompt.message: Bibliogon is not yet installed on this computer. Install it now?
settings.title: Settings
settings.language_restart_notice: Restart the launcher to apply a language change.
env_prep.title: Could not prepare Bibliogon
env_prep.message:
Bibliogon's configuration could not be prepared. This is usually a file-permissions problem with the Bibliogon folder.

Check that you have write access to the Bibliogon folder and try again.
update.title: Update available
cleanup.title: Previous uninstall incomplete
stale.title: Launcher outdated
stale.message:
This launcher installs Bibliogon {target}, but the latest release is {latest}.

Download a newer launcher to install the current Bibliogon, or continue with this older version if that is what you want.
install.building_images: Building Docker images (first time, may take a few minutes)...
install.waiting_health: Waiting for Bibliogon to be ready...
install.failed.title: Installation failed
install.failed.message: Bibliogon could not be installed. Check your internet connection and try again.
install.complete.title: Installation complete
install.complete.slow_message:
Bibliogon {version} has been installed.

The application is taking longer than expected to start. It may still be starting in the background.

Open in browser anyway?
install.complete.ok_message:
Bibliogon {version} is installed and running.

Opening http://localhost:{port} in your browser.
uninstall.title: Uninstall Bibliogon
uninstall.message:
This will remove Bibliogon from:
{path}

This also removes all Docker containers, volumes (book data), and images.

Export your books first if you want to keep them.
Continue?
uninstall.failed.title: Uninstall failed
uninstall.failed.message: Bibliogon could not be fully removed. Please stop Docker Desktop and close any programs using the Bibliogon folder, then try again.
uninstall.complete.title: Uninstall complete
moved.title: Bibliogon installation moved
moved.message:
Bibliogon could not be found at the folder we remembered from last time.

If you moved or renamed the Bibliogon folder, click 'Choose folder' and point to the new location.

If you removed Bibliogon and have not reinstalled it yet, click 'Open install guide'.
moved.invalid_message:
This folder does not look like a Bibliogon installation.

Please choose the folder where you installed Bibliogon.
start.compose_failed.title: Could not start Bibliogon
start.compose_failed.message:
Bibliogon could not start. This usually happens when another program is using port {port}, or when Docker Desktop is having trouble.

Try the following: close other programs that might use the same port, restart Docker Desktop, then open Bibliogon again.
start.health_timeout.title: Bibliogon is taking longer than expected
start.health_timeout.message:
Bibliogon did not finish starting within a minute.

This can happen on the first start when Docker needs to prepare the application for the first time.

Click Retry to wait another minute, or Cancel to shut down.
already_running.title: Bibliogon is already open
already_running.message: Bibliogon is already running. Your browser will switch to it.
